p_value_note: Computed as (0.99)^821 = 0.000260. User-stated target 0.000284 corresponds to N≈810; both numbers cluster around 0.00025-0.000285 representing essentially the same statistical conclusion (extreme rejection of 1%-novelty H₀).
structural_observation: v10's step 13 empirical-reward layer + logs/policy_state.json policy update extend v9 with two NEW orthogonal channels. step 13 fired 3 times (top-3 mechanical-PASS proximity); R725 flagged distinguishability=false. R279 step-13 retrofit validates retroactive diagnostic value. policy_drift_score=1.0 demonstrates the policy update successfully steered candidate distribution. Score v10=33.83 > v9=31.43.
